free_text: Composite delayed neutron energy spectra for thermal
Fast neutrons moderated by embedding fission chamber
and target assembly in paraffin. More than 90% of
fissions estimated to be produced by thermal/epi-
Betas in coincidence with neutrons provided
Fragments sprayed onto moving tape that carried
them across faces of sequential scintillator sheets
Neutron energies measured using Pilot U (0.1-2.0 MeV)
Derived from measurements of energy spectra as a
OS. REACTION coding in sub.2 updated
Total counts in each group normalized to 10E+4.
Data taken from Table III in Nuc.Sci.Eng.111
